title: Syrian Meat Spring Rolls
description: A kid-friendly Syrian dish featuring egg roll wrappers and halal-friendly ingredients, these savory spring rolls are tender and full of flavor. They can be served as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground beef, cooked rice, grind rice, fried onions, spices, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Lay an egg roll wrapper on a flat surface with one corner pointing towards you.
Place about 1 tablespoon of the meat mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with water.
Fold the bottom corner of the wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add a few of the spring rolls to the skillet and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the spring rolls from the oil and drain on paper towels.
Serve the spring rolls hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
